name: puppy small & mini savory stew with chicken & vegetables
description: hill's science diet puppy small & mini savory stew with chicken & vegetables is a delicious way to provide precisely balanced nutrition to improve the overall health and well-being of your small or toy puppy. made with real chicken, brown rice, and a medley of delectable vegetables all smothered in tasty gravy. high-quality protein for building lean muscles made with purposeful ingredients for a flavorful, nutritious meal easy-to-digest
